name: Hatchet's Study
description:
You are in a small, cluttered room.  You are amazed by the amount of trash in
this room, especially compared to the large, opulent room this is connected to.
A picture of the fair lady Icaza is on a wall, next to a Cindy Crawford
calendar.  You can hear the song 'Somewhere Out There' in the background.  The
exit is to the south.
